name: US Virgin Islands Tax Liability Reduction

eligibility.description: Applies to income sourced within the USVI or effectively connected to a USVI trade or business. Does not apply to U.S. citizens/residents who are required to pay tax to the USVI under section 932(b).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows for the reduction of tax liability incurred to the Virgin Islands for income derived from sources within the USVI or effectively connected with a USVI trade or business.
